whenRequired: orchestration changes that can alter render/navigation truth
minimumProof: key modal or action path when applicable
explicit classification of harness vs product blockers

whenRequired: cross-platform runtime changes on supported host
minimumProof: real runtime proof on supported host
or explicit HOST_BLOCKED status when the current host cannot run iOS

forbiddenShortcuts: manual visual claim without exact command
assuming iOS is green because web/android are green
downgrading runtime proof to screenshots only
masking harness issues as product regressions
